case_title: ANDREY GIPPIUS VS. SEMAX ENTERPRISES INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIPPIUS, ANDREY AS TO DEFENDANT SEMAX ENTERPRISES INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
